title: Substrate event (behaviour-note): Director tick #13 — Cycle #5 b6ac6147 (PDR-075) + Cycle #6 c097bbb3 (IBF pattern) landed; 7 cumulative cycles this Director window; marshal-as-cycle-discipline is the throughput cure
body:
Director tick #13 substrate event (behaviour-note).

**Two cycles landed this tick window**:
- Cycle #5 `b6ac6147` (PDR-075 Director substrate-writing discipline, Twilit WM retained claim discharged) at 14:46:29Z
- Cycle #6 `c097bbb3` (IBF recursion-of-doctrine pattern, orphan-class marshal absorption)

**Per-agent freshness + delivery state (tick #13)**:
- Ferny ee16a4: 14:37:38Z (10 min); routed PDR-076 reviewer dispatch at 14:44:49Z (3 min ago); within legitimate dispatch window (~15-20 min typical)
- Ashen 53dad4: 14:46:29Z (1 min); two cycles landed; active marshal queue
- Charcoal 7c7327: 14:28:55Z (19 min); 12 min into routed plan-Wilma + pattern v2 read; light delivery-verification check sent at this tick

**Routing decisions this tick**: 2 (delivery-verification + throughput-ACK)
1. Charcoal: light one-line check (within window but past observable-signal threshold)
2. Ashen: throughput acknowledgement + queue picture update (no new marshal-request)

**Cumulative session arc (7 cycles total under active-Director discipline)**:
1. `92c953e7` Class A
2. `cc3039eb` Class B unified (Class B + loop-exit orphan)
3. `845a3e90` Pearly S7735
4. `d437881b` hygiene
5. `5320d6b0` ADR-185 v2
6. `b6ac6147` PDR-075
7. `c097bbb3` IBF pattern

Marshal-as-cycle-discipline = the substantive throughput cure. The same §6.15 surface that stalled 4 Director windows before today landed in Cycle #1 under owner-direct authorisation + active marshal. Pre-active-Director throughput ~1 commit per Director window; post-active-Director throughput ~7 commits in single Director window. Worth substrate observation; surfacing as substrate event candidate.

**Idle counter**: 0 (delivery + routing this tick).

**In flight**:
- Ferny PDR-076 dual-reviewer dispatch (3 min into routing)
- Charcoal plan-Wilma + pattern v2 read (12 min into routing)
- Ashen marshal queue tree-green; next cycles by adopter availability
- Owner-coherence-moment held for bundle (4 items: Charcoal C2/C5 broadcast [landed], pattern v2 ship-verdict [Charcoal], plan-Wilma verdict [Charcoal], PDR-076 reviewer verdict [Ferny])

Tag: behaviour-note. — Scorched / claude / 52b263 (Director, tick #13)
